title: polygala arvensis
intro: Polygala arvensis, also known as the common or field milkwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Polygalaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala arvensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or by using it as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
